name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual reconciliation causes late financial reporting. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: daily reconciliation of bank statements with accounting records
